chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 627 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 9061/2025. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on MA 9062/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 11.11.2025. None present. = This Criminal Miscellaneous Application was filed by the respondent / applicant in respect of certain cheque which was bounced. Learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has ordered for recording of statement of applicant / respondent No.1 Ahmed Hussain as the cheque was dishonoured. I find no merit in this Criminal Miscellaneous Application which is dismissed for the above reasons alongwith pending applications. JUDGE Tufail
